title: 250th Mountain Drive parkrun celebrated
description: LOCAL NEWS AND VIDEO - Celebrations were the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"LOCAL NEWS AND VIDEO - Celebrations were the order of the day at the 250th Mountain Drive parkrun this morning.","html":"LOCAL NEWS AND VIDEO - Celebrations were the order of the day at the 250th Mountain Drive parkrun this morning."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Event director Dave Neill welcomed all the runners and visitors at the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The first male runner over the finish line was Kgahliso Ntoagae and the first woman was Charmaine Prins.","html":"The first male runner over the finish line was Kgahliso Ntoagae and the first woman was Charmaine Prins."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The milestone was celebrated afterwards with cupcakes and great conversation.","html":"The milestone was celebrated afterwards with cupcakes and great conversation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Video: Mountain View parkrun celebrated"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
